title: Weighted Shortest Paths and Relaxation · Algorithm Workbench
summary: Choose safe routes across positive, negative, and unreachable weighted networks. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a multi-algorithm route engine with path proofs while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State and apply edge relaxation while preserving predecessor evidence.
Run Dijkstra only under compatible nonnegative weights and stale-entry handling.
Use repeated relaxation to find shortest paths and reachable negative-cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
